entity.summary: Malta-based centralized digital-asset exchange and institutional trading platform within the BEQUANT group.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded row hei_unadded_0223. Official BEQUANT group materials identify Malta-incorporated holding and operating companies and a Malta headquarters; related group companies also exist in England and Seychelles.

events.title: Bequant present in exchange source data
events.description: Bequant appeared in the verified-unadded candidate pool through CoinPaprika exchange data and is retained as a Malta-based centralized exchange and institutional trading-platform entity.
events.notes: Official group materials now support the Malta origin classification and official domain. Add a precise launch or operating milestone if stronger dated evidence is found.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika exchange reference for Bequant
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0223.

evidence.title: BEQUANT group overview and Malta headquarters
evidence.notes: Official group overview lists BEQUANT Holding Limited and BEQUANT Pro Limited as incorporated in Malta and identifies Malta group headquarters, supporting the Malta origin classification.
